officialTitle: ECB Euro foreign exchange reference rates (Data Portal API, EXR dataflow)
excerpt: The ECB publishes daily euro foreign exchange reference rates (around 16:00 CET on TARGET business days). The Data Portal REST API serves the EXR dataflow, e.g. /service/data/EXR/D.USD.EUR.SP00.A. Rates are expressed as units of foreign currency per 1 EUR; the EUR value of a foreign amount is amount / rate.
